top_findings.title: POST /books endpoint
top_findings.evidence: src/app.ts:25-41 — endpoint accepts title, author, year, isbn and returns 201

top_findings.title: GET /books endpoint with ?author= filter
top_findings.evidence: src/app.ts:44-53 — endpoint supports author query parameter with LIKE filtering

top_findings.title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
top_findings.evidence: src/app.ts:56-62 — endpoint returns single book by ID with 404 handling

top_findings.title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint
top_findings.evidence: src/app.ts:65-91 — endpoint updates book fields with partial update support

top_findings.title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
top_findings.evidence: src/app.ts:94-101 — endpoint deletes book and returns 204
